data.title: RED: Write pytest assertions for re-invocation guard language in implementation-plan SKILL.md
data.description:
## Context
Story 2a2f-eacc: implementation-plan re-invocation guard. This RED task writes structural test assertions that will fail against the current SKILL.md (which has no guard section) and pass after the guard is added.

## TDD Requirement (RED)
Create tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py with these test functions:
- test_skill_contains_reinvocation_guard_heading: assert "Re-invocation Guard" or "re-invocation" in SKILL.md content
- test_skill_references_include_archived: assert "--include-archived" in SKILL.md (for archived child handling)
- test_skill_classifies_closed_children_readonly: assert "read-only" near "closed" in SKILL.md (within 5 lines)
- test_skill_classifies_inprogress_children_flagged: assert "flagged" near "in-progress" or "in_progress" in SKILL.md
- test_skill_produces_diff_plan: assert "new or reopened" or "diff plan" in SKILL.md

All tests MUST FAIL (RED) against the current SKILL.md.

## Files to create/modify
- tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py (CREATE)
- .test-index (MODIFY: add new test file to existing SKILL.md mapping line)

## Test filename fuzzy match
Source: plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md → normalize: "skillmd"
Test: test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py → normalize: "testimplementationplanreinvocationguardpy"
"skillmd" is NOT a substring of normalized test name → .test-index entry REQUIRED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py exists with at least 5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^def test_" tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] All 5 tests fail (RED) against current SKILL.md — confirm by running the tests
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py -v 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED"
- [ ] .test-index entry maps SKILL.md to new test file
  Verify: grep -q "test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard" .test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0 (RED tests tolerated by .test-index marker)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py
